message:
fix(sync): serialize once_cell blocking tests to prevent cross-test interference

The global BLOCKING_WAIT_HOOK static was shared across parallel test
threads, causing intermittent RecvError panics when one test's hook
channels were picked up by another test's wait_for_init_blocking call.
Added BLOCKING_TEST_SERIALIZER mutex to 6 affected tests.

Fixes asupersync-1qfd0.238

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
